{{Quote|Utilizing the finest neural-web reflex threads (reportedly woven by hand by the Poraskors of Betal), this bio-impulse interface allows quicker responses in combat situations.|A datapage of ''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'' detailing the [[Response iMprOVEMENT Package]]|<ref name="CRFG">[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]</ref>}}
'''Betal''' was a<ref name="CRFG" /> [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC" /> astronomical object<ref name="CRFG" /> located in the [[Betal system/Legends|Betal system]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was the origin point of the group known as the [[Poraskors]], who reportedly wove [[neural-web reflex thread]]s by [[Limb/Legends|hand]]. Betal was mentioned in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide]]'', a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] authored by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] that documented various pieces of equipment utilized by agents of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="CRFG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Betal was first mentioned in the [[1991]] sourcebook [[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']], which was written by [[Christopher Kubasik]] for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRFG" /> The [[StarWars.com]] [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|Online Companion]] to the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Betal [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Betal, within grid square J-5.<ref name="EAOC" />
